## Getting Started
This project uses [devbox](https://github.com/jetify-com/devbox) to manage its development environment.

Install devbox:
```sh
curl -fsSL https://get.jetpack.io/devbox | bash
```

Start the devbox shell:
```sh 
devbox shell
```

Run a script in the devbox environment:
```sh
devbox run <script>
```
## Scripts
Scripts are custom commands that can be run using this project's environment. This project has the following scripts:

* [broadcast](#devbox-run-broadcast)
* [clippy](#devbox-run-clippy)
* [test](#devbox-run-test)

## Environment

```sh
LD_LIBRARY_PATH="${DEVBOX_PROFILE_DIR}/lib"
LIBCLANG_PATH="${DEVBOX_PROFILE_DIR}/lib"
LIBRARY_PATH="/home/jveiga/rust/mojo-puzzles-cuda-oxide/.devbox/nix/profile/default/lib"
RUSTUP_HOME="/home/jveiga/rust/mojo-puzzles-cuda-oxide/.devbox/virtenv/rustup"
```

## Shell Init Hook
The Shell Init Hook is a script that runs whenever the devbox environment is instantiated. It runs 
on `devbox shell` and on `devbox run`.
```sh
export BINDGEN_EXTRA_CLANG_ARGS="-I$CUDA_INCLUDE_DIR"
export CPATH="$CUDA_INCLUDE_DIR:${CPATH:-}"
export CUDA_INCLUDE_DIR="$DEVBOX_PROFILE_DIR/include"
export LD_LIBRARY_PATH="$DEVBOX_PROFILE_DIR/lib:$SYSTEM_CUDA_LDFLAGS:${LD_LIBRARY_PATH:-}"
export LIBRARY_PATH="$DEVBOX_PROFILE_DIR/lib:$SYSTEM_CUDA_LDFLAGS:${LIBRARY_PATH:-}"
export NIX_CFLAGS_COMPILE="-I$CUDA_INCLUDE_DIR ${NIX_CFLAGS_COMPILE:-}"
export NIX_LDFLAGS="$SYSTEM_CUDA_LDFLAGS ${NIX_LDFLAGS:-}"
export SYSTEM_CUDA_LDFLAGS="-L/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu -L/usr/lib64 -L/usr/lib/w32-brand"
```

## Packages

* [rustup@latest](https://www.nixhub.io/packages/rustup)
* [gcc@latest](https://www.nixhub.io/packages/gcc)
* [llvmPackages_21.libclang](https://www.nixhub.io/packages/llvmPackages_21.libclang)
* [cudaPackages.cudatoolkit@12](https://www.nixhub.io/packages/cudaPackages.cudatoolkit)

## Script Details

### devbox run broadcast
```sh
cargo oxide run --bin broadcast
```
&ensp;

### devbox run clippy
```sh
cargo clippy
```
&ensp;

### devbox run test
```sh
cargo test
```
&ensp;
